title: Number of Longest Increasing Subsequence
titleCn: 最长递增子序列的个数

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,5,4,7] Output: 2 Explanation: The two longest increasing subsequences are [1, 3, 4, 7] and [1, 3, 5, 7].
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The two longest increasing subsequences are [1, 3, 4, 7] and [1, 3, 5, 7].

testcases.input: nums = [2,2,2,2,2] Output: 5 Explanation: The length of the longest increasing subsequence is 1, and there are 5 increasing subsequences of length 1, so output 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The length of the longest increasing subsequence is 1, and there are 5 increasing subsequences of length 1, so output 5.
